rules.title: Project proponents may refer to existing literature on model validation for the specific project area and crops used in baseline as well as project scenarios.
rules.logic: Project proponents may refer to existing literature on model validation for the specific project area and crops used in baseline as well as project scenarios.

rules.title: Model validation must be carried out for the baseline crop and area parameters as well as the NUE crop and parameters in the project scenario.
rules.logic: Model validation must be carried out for the baseline crop and area parameters as well as the NUE crop and parameters in the project scenario.
